items.title: The wild rise of OpenClaw...
items.author: Fireship
items.content:
<article>Try out Traycer’s orchestration tool to make your coding agents smarter - https://traycer.ai/fireship

OpenClaw fka Moltbot fka ClawdBot is the most hyped AI application of 2026. But this isn't your average chatbot - it's a free and open source assistant that actually takes care of your everyday tasks. Let's run it.

#coding #ai #programming #clawdbot #moltbot

items.title: A brief history of programming...
items.author: Fireship
items.content:
<article>Try out the Junie coding agent in your JetBrains IDE - https://jb.gg/Fireship-Junie-AI

Computing has come a long way since we figured out that 1s and 0s were pretty useful. In today's video, we look at the history of programming from the Turing machine to modern JavaScript...
